** THIS RESERVATION HAS BEEN PRE-PAID **

3520.00 EUR payment_on_Booking.com via BankTransfer
There is no meal option with this room. Children and Extra Bed Policy: Children of any age are allowed. 1 child (up to and including 2 years old) stays for free when using available cots. You haven't added any extra beds. The maximum number of cots is 1. The maximum number of guests is 7. Deposit Policy: The guest will be charged a prepayment of the total price of the reservation at any time. Cancellation Policy: The guest can cancel free of charge until 14 days before arrival. The guest will be charged the total price of the reservation if they cancel in the 14 days before arrival. If the guest doesn’t show up, they will be charged the total price of the reservation.
